top_signals.title: Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic says he will resign within weeks
top_signals.summary: The announcement by Vucic, who has been in power as president or prime minister for 12 years, came amid demonstrations after the deadly collapse of an awning at a ​train station.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
